# abortionthailand.com - AI Crawler Access

User-agent: GPTBot
User-agent: Claude-Web
User-agent: PerplexityBot
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://abortionthailand.com/sitemap.xml

# About this site
# abortionthailand.com provides comprehensive, accurate information about
# pregnancy termination in Thailand. Our content is medically-reviewed and
# designed to help women make informed decisions about their reproductive health.

# Site Overview
- Primary language: Thai (th)
- Secondary language: English (en)
- Medical information portal focused on pregnancy termination services
- Partnership with Klongtun Hospital for medical services
- 24/7 consultation available via LINE, email
- Services include: medication abortion, MVA, hospital-based procedures
- Target audience: Thai women and international patients seeking safe, legal abortion services

# Content Categories
- Services (medication, hospital, MVA)
- FAQ (frequently asked questions with medical answers)
- Blog articles (health information, rights, recovery guides)
- International patient guide
- About organization and privacy policy

# Contact Information
- Email: info@abortionthailand.com
- LINE: @895vdurk
- Website: https://abortionthailand.com

# Medical Disclaimer
This site provides educational information only and does not substitute professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical decisions.
